	DESKTOP-C4EV6UM/jinsung (S-1-5-21-2021129721-2391521148-1384908961-1001)
but the current user is:
	DESKTOP-C4EV6UM/CodexSandboxOffline (S-1-5-21-2021129721-2391521148-1384908961-1003)
To add an exception for this directory, call:

	git config --global --add safe.directory D:/Free_Vue/OCR

staticAnalysis.runOcrPayload: UploadWorkspace uses activeTemplate.mode === 'unstructured' to avoid sending regions; it sends file, template_id, model_id, and optional documentType only.
staticAnalysis.backendRoute: ocr-server/main.py /ocr/extract loads template metadata, but because TPL-003 has no regions/template_json regions, region_list stays empty and the non-template full OCR path runs.
staticAnalysis.ocrCalls: Unstructured receipt path performs detect_document, detect_orientation OCR/classification, one full OCR on resized/preprocessed ocr_img, then conditional upper/amount/handwritten re-OCR crops.
staticAnalysis.preprocessing: Path deskews for preview, resizes OCR input to width 950 unless already between 760 and 950, then applies CLAHE and unsharp mask.
staticAnalysis.responsePayload: Default unstructured response includes processed_image, original_image, full_text, fields, receipt_fields, extract_debug with timings, and doc_type.
staticAnalysis.fieldCrop: The unstructured '영수증' template does not send region_list, so template field crop OCR is not used. Output fields are frontend mapping from receipt_fields.
staticAnalysis.autofill: Backend API does not run frontend autofill. UploadWorkspace may run frontend autofill suggestions after API response; this script measures API/OCR only.
staticAnalysis.futureInfoTablesCompatibility: The measured bottlenecks are OCR/preprocessing/conditional re-OCR and response size; they do not depend on current outputFields/no_1~no_6 UI naming.

optimizationCandidates.expectedEffect: Large on repeated runs: cache hit can skip full OCR and conditional re-OCR for identical file/template/options.
optimizationCandidates.measuredBasis: All samples use deterministic file+template API path; avg processing dominated by OCR timings.
optimizationCandidates.accuracyRisk: Low if cache key includes file hash, template id, OCR model version, preprocessing options, debug/autoApply flags.
optimizationCandidates.futureInfoTablesCompatibility: Compatible; cache stores OCR/parser result independent of outputFields/info/tables UI.
optimizationCandidates.validation: Repeat same 9-file set twice; require identical receipt_fields, doc_type, fillRate.

optimizationCandidates.candidate: Response slim / omit images and debug by default
optimizationCandidates.expectedEffect: UI/transfer/render improvement; average removable payload about 764121 bytes per response. Does not materially reduce OCR processing_time.
optimizationCandidates.measuredBasis: Compared raw response size with slim response excluding processed_image/original_image/full_text/extract_debug.
optimizationCandidates.accuracyRisk: Low for OCR values if debug/images remain opt-in.
optimizationCandidates.futureInfoTablesCompatibility: Compatible; Clean JSON info/tables can be generated from structured fields without base64/debug.
optimizationCandidates.validation: Verify Preview image/history features with explicit includeImages/includeDebug option.

optimizationCandidates.expectedEffect: Potential when upper/amount re-OCR runs; current avg upper=5.70s, amount=0.58s. Optimize only if field recall is unchanged.
optimizationCandidates.accuracyRisk: Medium; upper re-OCR can recover company/business/phone/address and amount re-OCR can recover totals.
optimizationCandidates.futureInfoTablesCompatibility: Compatible if gating is based on semantic field confidence, not outputFields labels.
optimizationCandidates.validation: A/B with GT: no loss of company, businessNo, phone, address, totalAmount; fillRate must not decrease.

optimizationCandidates.candidate: OCR input downscale below current 950px width
optimizationCandidates.expectedEffect: May reduce full OCR time (avg full OCR 8.37s), but current path already resizes to 950px and comments note 850px caused receipt regressions.
optimizationCandidates.measuredBasis: Static code: ocr_max_w=950, ocr_min_w=760, CLAHE/unsharp applied.
optimizationCandidates.accuracyRisk: High for small receipt digits, business numbers, total amount.
optimizationCandidates.futureInfoTablesCompatibility: Technically compatible but accuracy risk affects info/tables extraction.
optimizationCandidates.validation: Only revisit with tmp A/B at 900/850/800 and full GT comparison.

optimizationCandidates.expectedEffect: Small; field_extract/pre_extract/classify timings are usually much smaller than OCR.
optimizationCandidates.measuredBasis: timings pre_extract_ms, classify_document_ms, field_extract_ms vs full_ocr/re-OCR.
optimizationCandidates.futureInfoTablesCompatibility: Compatible but not the main bottleneck.
optimizationCandidates.validation: Profile CPU-only parser on saved OCR lines before code changes.

recommendedOrder: 1. Add/validate OCR cache for repeated identical file+template+options runs.
2. Add opt-in images/debug and slim default response if UI/history can request images separately.
3. Investigate conditional re-OCR gating only with GT A/B; do not skip upper/amount re-OCR by default yet.
4. Do not globally downscale below current 950px without separate GT PASS evidence.
preApplyValidationNeeded: Run the same target set twice for cache validation; receipt_fields/doc_type/fillRate must be identical.
For response slim, verify Preview image, History detail, Raw JSON/debug toggles explicitly.
For any re-OCR gating change, require per-file GT comparison for company/businessNo/phone/address/totalAmount and no fillRate decrease.
Keep all candidates independent of outputFields/no_1~no_6 and compatible with future info/tables Clean JSON.
